claim: Claude Cowork Skills are reusable, automatable workflows that combine prompts, tools, and integrations to execute complex multi-step tasks without human intervention
actionable: Build skills by wrapping detailed prompts + tool access + connectors; treat a skill as a callable unit of automation, not just a prompt template
source_channel: Brock Mesarich | AI for Non Techies
source_title: Anthropic Just Dropped Claude for Small Businesses (31 Skills)

claim: The Business Pulse skill can orchestrate parallel pulls from multiple SaaS tools (QuickBooks, Stripe, Gmail, etc.) simultaneously to aggregate business state and surface priorities
actionable: Design skills to parallelize data pulls from multiple sources; structure outputs as priority-ranked summaries, not raw data dumps
source_channel: Brock Mesarich | AI for Non Techies
source_title: Anthropic Just Dropped Claude for Small Businesses (31 Skills)

claim: Invoice Chase skill uses customer payment history scoring to tone-match follow-up emails (aggressive for bad payers, gentle for good ones) before sending
actionable: Use historical data to score reliability; gate outputs through an approval step; vary tone/urgency based on behavioral scoring
source_channel: Brock Mesarich | AI for Non Techies
source_title: Anthropic Just Dropped Claude for Small Businesses (31 Skills)

claim: Job Post Builder skill generates hiring packets (job post + interview guide + offer letter + DocuSign integration) from a single form input
actionable: Batch related outputs together; integrate document signing tools; let users specify delivery method at input time
source_channel: Brock Mesarich | AI for Non Techies
source_title: Anthropic Just Dropped Claude for Small Businesses (31 Skills)

claim: Connectors enable skills to work across apps; Zapier MCP bridges gaps where Claude doesn't natively integrate (e.g., School, SynthFlow)
actionable: When a tool isn't natively connected, layer Zapier MCP on top; this extends integrations to 8000+ apps without rebuilding
